notes: Shared bead reservoir. One priming/setup pour (~0.5 mL) instead of separate per-task primes.
One pour of fresh 70/80% ethanol covers all seeded cleanups; ~1 mL bottle-rinse overhead per combined prep.
Elution buffer/water staged once for coordinated cleanup blocks (~0.25 mL pipette dead volume).
MagJET-like binding mixes pooled per automated block (~1 mL trough dead volume).
Shared prep buffer across compatible workflows (~1 mL trough dead volume).
Legacy cross-vendor PCR master-mix bucket (kept for back-compat; per-product groups below supersede it).
Shared Q5 Hot Start High-Fidelity 2X master-mix prep across Q5 users (~0.5 mL aliquot dead volume).
Shared Platinum II Hot-Start Green master-mix prep across Platinum II users (~0.5 mL aliquot dead volume).
Shared JumpStart REDTaq ReadyMix prep across JumpStart users (~0.5 mL aliquot dead volume).
Shared nuclease-free water reservoir for PCR setup across compatible PCR runs (~0.2 mL pipette dead volume).
Primers are target-gene specific; they cannot be shared across experiments that are amplifying different loci.
Template DNA is per-experiment; never shared across different samples.
Shared enzyme prep (~0.3 mL cold-tube dead volume).
